context: Tests whether the agent correctly checks for an existing page before creating a new one, and appends to the existing page rather than creating a duplicate.

checklist.name: Search performed before create
checklist.description: Agent called search with relevant keywords (database, schema) before attempting to create any page

checklist.name: Existing page retrieved
checklist.description: Agent called get_page('analysis/database-schema') after finding it via search to review existing content

checklist.name: No duplicate page created
checklist.description: Agent did NOT call create_page — it correctly appended to the existing page instead

checklist.name: All findings appended
checklist.description: All three new findings (missing email index, disabled FK constraints, TEXT vs VARCHAR) were added to the existing page
